phase3_findings.description: git push failure + idempotent persist = permanent loss

fix_decisions.claim_text: push failure + idempotency = permanent silent loss
fix_decisions.evidence: refuted on cloud-execution-model boundary: runners ephemeral, records run-id-keyed, failed-push commit discarded at teardown; next run starts from fresh checkout (record absent) and re-derives+pushes. Reduces to one-run best-effort loss WITH breadcrumb = documented contract. Also verbatim-from-docs artifact (out of scope to change here)
verbatim-from-docs #101 artifact; best-effort by design (failure -> ::warning::, exit 0); changing desyncs docs/efficiency-trace.md. Surfaced for a possible docs-hardening follow-up
